name: Tempera Amp Skin
description: This sleek amp skin is a masterstroke of craftsmanship.

languages.description: Este elegante diseño de amp es una obra maestra artesanal.
languages.name: Diseño Tempera de amp

languages.description: 这款光滑的增幅器外观堪称工艺杰作。

languages.description: สกิน Amp ที่ดูเรียบหรูชิ้นนี้คืองานฝีมือชั้นยอด

languages.description: Bu şık amp skin, işçiliğin bir başyapıtıdır.
